---
name: Protocol Feature Request
about: Propose a new protocol feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Brief description of the desired feature.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?
e.g. "The current protocol does not support..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed solution.

## Affected Protocol Areas

Which areas are affected?
- [ ] Buy Protocol
- [ ] Sell Protocol
- [ ] Cooperation Protocol
- [ ] Dispute Protocol
- [ ] Governance / DAO Codex
- [ ] Identity / Auth
- [ ] Other

## Phase

- [ ] Phase 1 (MVP) – should be implemented in Phase 1
- [ ] Phase 2+ – can wait until Phase 2 or later

## Alternatives

What alternative solutions have been considered?

## Additional Information

Add any other context about the request here.
